models.smallLocalDefault: gemma3:4b for classify/route/safety; qwen2.5-coder:3b restricted to harmless summaries
models.smallLocalFallback: qwen2.5-coder:7b or qwen3:4b when 3B fails verification
models.mediumLocalImplementation: qwen2.5-coder:14b-instruct for selected-file patch generation only; not safety authority
models.vllmCandidate: gemma-4-e2b-it verified through vLLM; qwen2.5-coder-7b failed safety; devstral timed out
models.largeRemotePlanning: gemini/codex/cerebras only for uncertain architecture or cross-zone refactors
models.fastRemoteImplementation: cerebras 8B/235B only after deterministic file selection

stages.output: 3 to 12 candidate files from route map

stages.model: gemma-4-e2b-it or external Codex/Hermes for risky architecture
stages.output: files to edit, tests to run, rollback note

stages.model: qwen2.5-coder:14b-instruct for bounded patches; external Codex/Hermes for risky work
deterministic scripts first, gemma3:4b summarizes only

stages.output: new route-map hint only if verified

successCriteria: Route/file map is updated when a new pattern is discovered.

stageGate.beforeModelCall: route/files/test command resolved by deterministic maps
stageGate.beforePatchApply: patch touches only selected files and includes rollback note
stageGate.beforeDeploy: build/smoke passes and ROLE_SYSTEM_MASTER execution feature is present

vllmStages.output: GET /v1/models returns exact model ids before routing uses vLLM
selected files, patch strategy, test command; no broad scan

vllmStages.model: devstral/qwen/gemma candidate only if context pack <= maxTotalLines
